prompt: An anime-style illustration of a cute girl with fluffy dark brown fox ears and long flowing dark brown hair. She is wearing a detailed red and white floral kimono with fur trim and a floral hair accessory with red tassels. She has a bright happy smile with a slight blush and warm amber eyes, reaching both hands forward towards the viewer in a welcoming hug. The perspective features strong foreshortening on her hands, which are slightly out of focus. The scene is set with falling snow against a bright white background, illuminated by soft, warm, ethereal lighting.
